name: HRC_COMP_DEF_TYPES_VL
query: select deftype.def_type_id ,deftype.ikey ,tl.name ,tl.description ,deftype.product_code ,deftype.legislation_code ,deftype.def_type_code ,deftype.enterprise_id ,deftype.attr_char1 ,deftype.attr_char2 ,deftype.attr_char3 ,deftype.attr_number1 ,deftype.attr_number2 ,deftype.attr_number3 ,deftype.attr_date1 ,deftype.attr_date2 ,deftype.attr_date3 ,deftype.created_by ,deftype.creation_date ,deftype.last_updated_by ,deftype.last_update_date ,deftype.last_update_login ,deftype.object_version_number ,deftype.module_id ,deftype.sguid ,deftype.seed_data_source FROM HRC_COMP_DEF_TYPES_B deftype, HRC_COMP_DEF_TYPES_TL tl WHERE deftype.def_type_id = tl.def_type_id(+) AND tl.LANGUAGE(+) = USERENV('LANG')
